code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut i = 0
  mut max_val = 0
  mut has_positive = false
  mut in_num = false
  mut sign = 1
  mut cur = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    let is_digit = b >= 48 and b <= 57
    let is_minus = b == 45
    let is_plus = b == 43
    if in_num
      if is_digit
        cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      else
        let val = cur * sign
        if val > 0
          if not has_positive
            max_val = val
            has_positive = true
          else if val > max_val
            max_val = val
          end
        end
        in_num = false
        sign = 1
        cur = 0
      end
    else
      if is_digit
        in_num = true
        cur = b - 48
      else if is_minus
        in_num = true
        sign = -1
        cur = 0
      else if is_plus
        in_num = true
        sign = 1
        cur = 0
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    let val = cur * sign
    if val > 0
      if not has_positive
        max_val = val
        has_positive = true
      else if val > max_val
        max_val = val
      end
    end
  end
  if has_positive
    println("max=#{max_val}")
  else
    println("none")
  end
end
